selection: 按 4–7 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: n. 例证, 插图
words.definition: n. artwork that helps make something clear or attractive

words.translation: n. 商店, 工厂, 车间；vi. 购物, 到处寻找
words.definition: n. a mercantile establishment for the retail sale of goods or services

words.translation: n. 一点点, 少许, 一会儿, 短时间；a. 小的, 很少的, 幼小的, 琐碎的, 短暂的, 矮小的
words.definition: n. a small amount or duration

words.translation: a. 害怕的, 恐怕的, 遗憾的
words.definition: a. filled with fear or apprehension

words.translation: vt. 买, 获得；vi. 买
words.definition: v. obtain by purchase; acquire by means of a financial transaction

words.translation: n. 金钱, 一笔款, 财富, 货币, 金额
words.definition: n. the most common medium of exchange; functions as legal tender

words.translation: n. 便士, 一分, 小钱, 点滴
words.definition: n. a fractional monetary unit of Ireland and the United Kingdom; equal to one hundredth of a pound

words.translation: n. 信用, 信任, 荣誉, 贷款, 学分；vt. 归功于, 赞颂, 信任, 相信
words.definition: n. money available for a client to borrow

words.translation: prep. 在...之上, 迫近, 紧接着
words.definition: prep. On; -- used in all the senses of that word, with which it

words.translation: n. 警察
words.definition: n. a member of a police force

words.translation: n. 书, 书籍, 帐簿, 名册, 工作簿；v. 登记, 预订
words.definition: n. a written work or composition that has been published (printed on pages bound together)

words.translation: n. 进位, 射程, 运载；vt. 携带, 运送, 支持, 传送, 包含
words.definition: n. the act of carrying something

words.translation: n. 门
words.definition: n. a swinging or sliding barrier that will close the entrance to a room or building or vehicle

words.translation: pron. 每件事物, 所有事物
words.definition: n. Whatever pertains to the subject under consideration;

words.translation: n. 事实, 真实性, 真相, 细节, 论据
words.definition: n. a piece of information about circumstances that exist or events that have occurred

words.translation: adv. 一次, 曾经, 一旦；conj. 一旦, 一经
words.definition: r. on one occasion

words.translation: n. 薪资, 付款, 补偿；vt. 支付, 付清, 补偿, 偿还, 对...有利, 为...涂防水物
words.definition: v. give money, usually in exchange for goods or services

words.translation: adv. 宁可, 稍微, 相当
words.definition: r. on the contrary; rather (or instead), he wrote her a letter"

words.translation: vt. 卖, 背叛, 销售, 出卖；vi. 卖, 销售
words.definition: n. the activity of persuading someone to buy

words.translation: vt. 发送, 使进入, 寄, 派遣, 发射, 使陷于；vi. 寄信, 派人, 播送
words.definition: v. cause to go somewhere

words.translation: n. 床, 睡眠处, 河床, 底座, 路基, 一层；vt. 提供宿处, 栽种, 安装
words.definition: n. a piece of furniture that provides a place to sleep

words.translation: n. 帐单, 清单, 钞票, 鸟嘴, 广告, 法案, 票据；vt. 开帐单, (用招贴)宣布
words.definition: n. a statute in draft before it becomes law

words.translation: n. 狗, 坏蛋；vt. 跟踪, 尾随
words.definition: n. a member of the genus Canis (probably descended from the common wolf) that has been domesticated by man since prehistoric times; occurs in many breeds

words.translation: v. 吃, 腐蚀
words.definition: v. take in solid food

words.translation: n. 嘴, 口, 口腔, 口状物；vi. 装腔作势说话, 做鬼脸
words.definition: n. the opening through which food is taken in and vocalizations emerge

words.translation: adv. 几乎, 密切地
words.definition: r (of actions or states) slightly short of or not quite accomplished; all but

words.translation: n. 村庄；a. 乡村的, 村庄的
words.definition: n. a community of people smaller than a town

words.translation: n. 咬, 一口；v. 咬, 刺痛, 穿透
words.definition: n. a wound resulting from biting by an animal or a person

words.translation: n. 故事, 谎言, 谣言, 陈述, 叙述
words.definition: n a message that tells the particulars of an act or occurrence or course of events; presented in writing or drama or cinema or as a radio or television program

words.translation: adv. 在后地；prep. 在...背后
words.definition: s. having the lower score or lagging position in a contest

words.translation: v. 相信
words.definition: v. accept as true; take to be true

words.translation: n. 少量, 马嚼子, 辅币；vt. 给马上嚼子, 控制
words.definition: n. a small fragment of something broken off from the whole

words.translation: n. 生意, 事情, 业务, 商业, 商行, 职责
words.definition: n. a commercial or industrial enterprise and the people who constitute it

words.translation: n. 变化, 找回的零钱, 找头, 更换；vt. 改变, 更换, 兑换
words.definition: n. an event that occurs when something passes from one state or phase to another

words.translation: n. 课程, 路线, 过程, 一道菜, 道路；v. 追, (使)跑
words.definition: n. education imparted in a series of lessons or meetings

words.translation: n. 女儿；a. 女儿的
words.definition: n. a female human offspring

words.translation: n. 全部, 完整；a. 充满的, 完全的, 丰富的, 完美的, 丰满的, 详尽的
words.definition: v. beat for the purpose of cleaning and thickening

words.translation: n. 一半, 半场, 不完全；a. 一半的, 不完全的, 部分的, 半场的
words.definition: n. one of two divisions into which some games or performances are divided: the two divisions are separated by an interval

words.translation: n. 低点, 低价, 低, 牛叫声；a. 低的, 消沉的, 低等的, 浅的, 卑贱的
words.definition: n. an air mass of lower pressure; often brings precipitation

words.translation: n. 名字, 名称, 姓名, 名义, 名誉, 文件名；vt. 命名, 称呼, 任命, 提名, 列举
words.definition: n. a language unit by which a person or thing is known

words.translation: n. 无, 不关紧要之事, 零；adv. 毫不, 决不
words.definition: n. a quantity of no importance

words.translation: n. 办公室, 部, 公职, 职责
words.definition: n. place of business where professional or clerical duties are performed

words.translation: n. 公开, 户外, 空旷；a. 开着的, 开放的, 开阔的, 营业着的, 公开的, 悬而未决的
words.definition: n. a clear or unobstructed space or expanse of land or water

words.translation: n. 经过, 要隘, 途径, 通行, 护照, 及格；vt. 经过, 越过, 通过, 批准, 度过, 传递, 忽略
words.definition: n. (military) a written leave of absence

words.translation: n. 人, 人身, 人称
words.definition: n. a human being

words.translation: n. 警察, 警察当局, 治安；vt. 维持治安, 管辖
words.definition: n. the force of policemen and officers

words.translation: n. 价格, 代价, 价值；vt. 定...的价格
words.definition: n. the amount of money needed to purchase something

words.translation: adv. 相当, 完全, 十分
words.definition: r. to a degree (not used with a negative)

words.translation: a. 真的, 真实的, 实际的, 实在的, 不动(产)的, 实数的；n. 实数, 现实
words.definition: n. the basic unit of money in Brazil; equal to 100 centavos

words.translation: a. 红的, 红色的, 红肿的, 流血的；n. 红色, 红颜料, 赤字
words.definition: n. red color or pigment; the chromatic color resembling the hue of blood

words.translation: n. 跑, 赛跑, 奔跑, 奔跑的路程, 趋向, 流出, 运转时间, 连续；vi. 跑, 奔跑, 跑步, 赛跑, 竞赛, 行驶, 运转, 进行, 蔓延
words.definition: n. a score in baseball made by a runner touching all four bases safely

words.translation: n. 出售, 卖, 拍卖, 销售额, 廉价出售
words.definition: n. a particular instance of selling

words.translation: prep. 自...以后, 自...以来；adv. 自那时以后
words.definition: adv. From a definite past time until now; as, he went a month

words.translation: a. 确信, 必然的, 必定的；adv. 当然, 确实地, 无疑地
words.definition: s. physically secure or dependable

words.translation: n. 队, 组；vt. 把马(牛)套在同一辆车上, 把...编成一组
words.definition: n. a cooperative unit (especially in sports)

words.translation: adv. 两次, 两倍
words.definition: r. two times

words.translation: n. 水, 雨水, 海水, 水位, 水面, 流水；vt. 给...浇水, 供以水, 注入水, 使湿
words.definition: n. binary compound that occurs at room temperature as a clear colorless odorless tasteless liquid; freezes into ice below 0 degrees centigrade and boils above 1

words.translation: pron. 每个人, 人人
words.definition: n. Every person.

words.translation: n. 执照, 许可证, 特许；vt. 许可, 特许, 认可
words.definition: n excessive freedom; lack of due restraint

words.translation: n. 奶油, 黄油；vt. 涂黄油于
words.definition: n. an edible emulsion of fat globules made by churning milk or cream; for cooking and table use

words.translation: n. 蛋糕, 块, 饼；vt. 使结块, 加块状物于
words.definition: n. a block of solid substance (such as soap or wax)

words.translation: a. 活的, 生动的, 精力充沛的, 实况转播的；vi. 活, 生存, 居住
words.definition: v. lead a certain kind of life; live in a certain style

words.translation: n. 匆促, 冲进, 急流, 灯心草；vi. 冲, 奔, 闯, 赶紧, 匆促行事, 涌现
words.definition: n. a sudden forceful flow

words.translation: n. 糖, 糖块, 甜言蜜语；vt. 加糖于, 使甜蜜, 粉饰, 美化
words.definition: n. a white crystalline carbohydrate used as a sweetener and preservative

words.translation: prep. 直到, 在...以前, 迄；conj. 直到...为止
words.definition: n. unstratified soil deposited by a glacier; consists of sand and clay and gravel and boulders mixed together

words.translation: n. 消费者
words.definition: n. someone who pays for goods or services

words.translation: num. 七, 七个
words.definition: n. the cardinal number that is the sum of six and one

words.translation: n. 书写, 著作, 笔迹, 作品
words.definition: n. the act of creating written works

words.translation: n. 厨子, 厨师；vt. 烹调, 煮饭, 加热
words.definition: n. someone who cooks food

words.translation: adv. 尤其, 特别, 格外
words.definition: r to a distinctly greater extent or degree than is common

words.translation: vt. 除, 除外；vi. 反对
words.definition: v take exception to

words.translation: n. 摸, 触觉, 知觉, 感觉, 情绪, 同情；a. 有同情心的, 有感觉的, 仁慈的, 动人的
words.definition: n. the experiencing of affective and emotional states

words.translation: n. 鱼, 鱼肉, 鱼类, 接合板；vt. 钓, 钓鱼, 查出, 用接合板连接
words.definition: n. any of various mostly cold-blooded aquatic vertebrates usually having scales and breathing through gills

words.translation: n. 头发, 毛发, 些微
words.definition: n. a covering for the body (or parts of it) consisting of a dense growth of threadlike structures (as on the human head); helps to prevent heat loss

words.translation: adv. 直接地, 立刻, 立即
words.definition: r. without delay or hesitation; with no time intervening

words.translation: n. 内部, 内脏, 内幕；a. 内部的, 秘密的, 户内的
words.definition: n. the region that is inside of something

words.translation: adv. 作为替代, 反而
words.definition: r in place of, or as an alternative to

words.translation: n. 失误, 避免, 失败, 小姐；vt. 未得到, 未达到, 未听到, 未觉察, 逃脱, 遗漏, 错过, 思念
words.definition: n. a failure to hit (or meet or find etc)

words.translation: n. 笔记, 记录, 注解, 票据, 符号, 显要, 注重, 便笺, 照会；vt. 记录, 注解, 注意

words.translation: n. 注意, 布告, 通知, 预告, 短评；vt. 注意, 通知, 评论, 提及, 关注

words.translation: n. 十月

words.translation: adv. 请；vt. 使高兴, 合...的心意, 取悦
words.definition: v. give pleasure to or be pleasing to

words.translation: vt. 拒绝, 谢绝；vi. 拒绝

words.translation: vt. 需要, 命令, 要求

words.translation: vt. 可作...用, 服务, 经历, 招待, 供应, 送交, 对待；vi. 服务, 服役, 侍应, 适合, 有用, 开球

words.translation: n. 大小, 尺寸, 规模, 尺码, 能力, 浆料；vt. 上浆, 依大小排列

words.translation: a. 暖和的, 暖的, 温暖的, 热烈的, 兴奋的, 激烈的, 多情的, 色情的；vt. 使温暖, 弄热, 使兴奋, 使充满仇恨

words.translation: n. 天气, 气象, 处境；a. 迎风的

words.translation: n. 窗户, 窗子, 窗口；vt. 给...开窗
words.definition: n. a framework of wood or metal that contains a glass windowpane and is built into a wall or roof to admit light or air

words.translation: n. 希望, 愿望, 祝愿, 命令, 请求；vt. 愿, 想要, 希望, 祝愿

words.translation: n. 信封, 封套, 封袋

words.translation: a. 更远的, 此外的, 更多的；vt. 促进, 增进, 助长

words.translation: n. 计算器, 计算者, 柜台, 筹码；a. 反方向的, 相反的

words.translation: n. 开始, 口子, 穴, 揭幕；a. 开始的

words.translation: n. 猫, 恶妇；vi. 呕吐
words.definition: n. feline mammal usually having thick soft fur and no ability to roar: domestic cats; wildcats

words.translation: n. 结束, 完结；a. 靠近的, 亲近的, 亲密的, 严密的, 关闭的, 狭窄的, 秘密的

words.translation: a. 舒服的, 轻松的；n. 盖被
words.definition: a. providing or experiencing physical well-being or relief (`comfy' is informal)

words.translation: a. 空的, 空虚的, 空腹的, 空洞的；n. 空的东西, 空车

words.translation: n. 去, 离去, 工作情况, 地面状况, 行为；a. 进行中的, 流行的, 成功的, 现存的

words.translation: n. 高度, 海拔, 高地, 顶点

words.translation: n. 英寸, 身高, 小岛；vi. 慢慢前进, 慢慢移动

words.translation: a. 左边的, 左倾的, 左侧的, 左派的；adv. 在左面
words.definition: n. location near or direction toward the left side; i.e. the side to the north when a person or object faces east

words.translation: n. 光, 光亮, 灯, 日光, 发光体, 光源, 杰出人物, 火花, 眼光；a. 轻的, 少量的, 轻微的, 轻快的, 轻浮的, 明亮的, 淡色的, 容易的

words.translation: n. 意义, 含义, 目的, 意图；a. 意味深长的
words.definition: n. the message that is intended or expressed or signified

words.translation: n. 噪音, 杂音, 响声, 喧闹；vt. 谣传
words.definition: n. sound of any kind (especially unintelligible or dissonant sound)

words.translation: n. 快乐, 愉快, 令人高兴的事, 娱乐, 希望；v. (使)高兴
words.definition: n. a fundamental feeling that is hard to define but that people desire to experience

words.translation: n. 口袋, 钱袋, 钱, 容器；vt. 装...在口袋里, 隐藏, 抑制, 私吞, 搁置, 击...入袋

words.translation: n. 棍, 棒, 刺, 枯枝, 茎, 条状物；vt. 插进, 刺入, 钉住, 伸出, 粘贴, 停止

words.translation: n. 尾部, 后部, 辫子, 随员, 特务, 燕尾服, 踪迹, 限定继承(权)；a. 在后面的, 从后面而来的, 限定继承的, 尾部的, 后部的

words.translation: n. 黄色；a. 黄色的
words.definition: n. yellow color or pigment; the chromatic color resembling the hue of sunflowers or ripe lemons

words.translation: n. 作家, 作家的著作, 创始人

words.translation: n. 条, 棒, 酒吧, 栅, 障碍物；vt. 禁止, 阻挡, 妨碍

words.translation: n. 现金；vt. 兑现
words.definition: n. money in the form of bills or coins

words.translation: num. 五, 五个
words.definition: n. the cardinal number that is the sum of four and one

words.translation: vt. 建立, 创立, 铸造；find的过去式和过去分词

words.translation: n. 货物
words.definition: n benefit

words.translation: a. 庄重的, 壮观的, 显赫的, 重大的, 最高的, 雄伟的, 宏大的, 豪华的, 傲慢的

words.translation: n. 长度, 长, 期间, 一段

words.translation: n. 计划, 设计, 事业；vt. 计划, 设计, 投掷, 发射, 使凸出, 放映

words.translation: n. 种子, 籽, 萌芽, 子孙, 精液；vt. 在...播种, 催...发育, 脱...籽

words.translation: num. 十, 十个
words.definition: n. the cardinal number that is the sum of nine and one; the base of the decimal system

words.translation: adv. 通常, 大抵
words.definition: r under normal conditions

words.translation: n. 饼干
words.definition: n. small round bread leavened with baking-powder or soda

words.translation: n. 取得, 拿, 诡计, 魂；vt. 接来, 取来, 售得, 带来, 推出, 引出, 杀死, 吸引, 到达

words.translation: n. 适宜, 合身, 发作, 痉挛；a. 适宜的, 对的, 准备好的
words.definition: n. a display of bad temper

words.translation: a. 离去的, 死去的, 用完的；go的过去分词
words.definition: s. no longer retained

words.translation: n. 匆忙, 急忙, 急促；vt. 急派, 催促
words.definition: n. a condition of urgency making it necessary to hurry

words.translation: n. 种类, 性质, 方式；a. 亲切的, 仁慈的, 和蔼的

words.translation: a. 长的, 长久的, 冗长的, 做多头的；vi. 渴望, 热望, 极想
words.definition: a. primarily temporal sense; being or indicating a relatively great or greater than average duration or passage of time or a duration as specified

words.translation: n. 铅笔, 色笔, 眉笔, 画笔, 光线束；vt. 用铅笔写或涂, 草拟

words.translation: n. 柱, 杆, 准星, 邮件, 邮政, 标竿, 职位, 岗位, 哨所, 兵营；vt. 张帖, 邮递, 公布, 登入帐, 使熟悉, 布置

words.translation: n. 现在, 礼品, 瞄准；a. 现在的, 出席的
